title: rubus × goetzii
intro: Rubus × goetzii, also known as the Black Raspberry, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Rubus fruticosus (black raspberry) and Rubus idaeus (red raspberry). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its high anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × goetzii include potential protection against cardiovascular disease, improved cognitive function, and anti-cancer properties. Rubus × goetzii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including jams, teas, capsules, and extracts, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in different ways.
